metadata.name: Set Up Automated MLS Search for a Buyer

description: An agent needs to set up an automated email search (a 'drip campaign') to send new listings to a buyer client.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the buyer's search criteria from their CRM profile (e.g., location, price, beds, baths).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the client's specific search parameters.

nodes.task_description: Create a new automated search in the MLS using the client's criteria.

expected_outcome.expected: An auto-search is successfully configured in the MLS system.

nodes.task_description: Configure the search to send new listings to the client instantly via email.

expected_outcome.expected: The notification settings are set to 'immediate email alerts' for the client.
